name: grape
description: Use Grape MCP from Codex for repository context continuity.

interface.shortDescription: Use local context continuity in Codex
interface.longDescription: Grape gives Codex a local MCP server for repeated-turn repository context. It tracks what was sent, what changed, what can be omitted, what can be restored, and what should be invalidated.
defaultPrompt: Use Grape context before editing this repo
Check what changed since my last Codex turn
Restore omitted context only if needed
